IS_UUID: {property} with value: '{value}' is not a valid UUID
IS_ENUM: {property} with value: '{value}' is not a valid enum value
IS_DATE_RANGE: {property} is not a valid date range
PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 8 characters long, 1 lowercase letter, 1 uppercase letter, 1 number and 1 special character
PASSWORD_MAX_LENGTH: Password must be less than 32 characters long, 1 lowercase letter, 1 uppercase letter, 1 number and 1 special character
PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: Password is too weak, 1 lowercase letter, 1 uppercase letter, 1 number and 1 special character
IS_ISO31661Alpha2: {property} is not a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code
